description: Normalized flux dataset repacked from the irregular toy raw HDF5 grid.

provenance.generator: custom Korg spectrum synthesis with a MARCS atmosphere grid
provenance.star_ordering: Rows follow natural sorting of raw star_*.hdf5 filenames (star_1, star_2, ..., star_N).

checks: final parameter row matches raw last star
final normalized flux row matches raw last star after linear-interpolation continuum upsampling
shared wavelength array matches raw line wavelength grid

normalization.method: Flux is divided by the continuum after linear interpolation from the continuum wavelength grid onto the line wavelength grid.

parameters.npy.description: Per-star parameters aligned row-by-row with normalized_flux.npy.

normalized_flux.npy.description: Continuum-normalized flux spectra sampled on the shared line wavelength grid.
